description_long: This is a large, rectangular horizontal banner with a sturdy metal frame supporting a flat panel. The front face displays bold Chinese characters, likely for advertising or informational purposes, on a light-colored background. The frame consists of multiple vertical and horizontal metal bars, providing structural integrity and a slightly industrial appearance. The back of the banner is plain, showing the dark brown or grayish panel material and the supporting metal framework. The overall construction suggests durability for outdoor use, with mounting brackets or hooks visible along the top edge. The banner is designed to be freestanding, likely placed on sidewalks or in front of storefronts for maximum visibility.
description: A large, freestanding horizontal banner with a metal frame and Chinese characters on a light background, designed for outdoor display. The structure is robust and industrial, with visible support bars and mounting brackets.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the depth of the metal frame structure.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain panel surface and the full length of the supporting metal bars.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow profile and frame depth seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the Chinese characters on the banner and the full width of the display area.
